I think she's totally worth if you have poison teams GDoll, Lilly, Daffodil, Agrippa.
She's got strong poison procs at E0 and helps poison proc teams.  I'd personally stop at E1 though even though E3 and OE are wild
E2 lets her exalt a lot more, and the %max hp damage gets better at E3 with 10 stacks of the spellbound and making the double resonance go wild

The current on banner unit is Xu, a good support. 

Im still in the midst of testing her for new players up to end of arc1. But she is good to pull 1 copy of

Multiple teams but you can focus on just one for story mode
you're gonna want 5 teams to clear the D-Tides (this games version of a tower)
In the mean time though, you can try to pull for her

I have e1 nautila, who else can i team up with caecus?

Caecus has 2 use cases

1. you use him as a utility bot for teams that need vulnerable or healing. his role is to occasionally play strike defense, exalt, and nothing else

2. you use him because you want to actually stack counter with his 2 cost, the only thing he is good at. in that case you put him in a counter team with teammates like wanda, nautila/pandia (to convert counter into dmg), ogier/clementine (for str so his 2 cost doesnt hit like a wet noodle)
I'm not really an expert in his builds bc I almost never use him but i think other variables are daff for temporary counter and miryam for aliemus and various buffs
bluwil uses him as both, since tawil needs vuln and can also stack enough temporary strength and copy caecus cards
If you are low level, like doing arc 1 story, then you don't need to stack strength and caecus counter by itself is enough dmg
but its woefully inadequate for late game
Ty ty for the help
Oh yeah, caecus 3 cost also makes counter trigger twice which makes him a useful support for a counter team even if you arent dpsing with him
